docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, KENT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-08-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-13-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AUGUST 13,2002 POS OSC IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2002, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
